dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And who the hell are you?

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Yeah... He was here, long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'm looking for someone named IVA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look that way, see that forest?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
